commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 9:22 And king Solomon passed all the kings of the earth in riches and wisdom. Douay Rheims 1609 Searching also for Ochozias himself, he took him lying hid in Samaria: and being brought unto him, he killed him, and they buried him: because he was the son of Josaphat, who had sought our Lord in all his heart (c) neither was there any more hope that any should reign of the stock of Ochozias. (c) Human hope failed, but Gods providence used means to conserve some of Davids issue to sit in his throne. yea to continue the succession till Christ.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
